title: Code Review verdict: APPROVE — ADR-0002 @ 39b1d1d (3 pure utils, 2 non-gating low notes)
description: Reviewed slug.ts/num.ts/str.ts against the live tree at commit 39b1d1d. 31/31 tests green, tsc clean, zero cross-imports, zero call sites — verified independently. No security or correctness defects. Verdict APPROVE. Two low-severity quality notes are forward-looking (Unicode handling) for when these utils get wired to live data, not merge blockers. Accept/reject each so they stay tracked and aren't re-flagged.

title: Security re-scan — 2 Medium findings STILL OPEN (local-seo-agency @ 39b1d1d)
description: Re-scan at commit 39b1d1d confirms both prior Medium findings remain unremediated (no overrides block in package.json, page.tsx:66-67 markup unchanged). 0 new security issues. The three new ADR-0002 lib modules (slug/num/str) are pure utilities — scanned clean. @google/generative-ai still unused. Decide whether to fix now or accept the latent risk.

title: Release v0.2.4 created locally — approve to publish + reconcile orphaned tags
description: A PATCH release (0.2.0→0.2.4) was committed and tagged locally (commit c958328, annotated tag v0.2.4). It adds three pure-utility lib modules (slug/num/str), a node --test harness, and ADR/planning docs. Versioning skipped 0.2.1–0.2.3 because those tags persist on commits orphaned by repeated workspace resets. Decide whether to publish and whether to clean up the orphaned tags.
